title: lactuca boissieri
intro: Lactuca boissieri, also known as Boissier's milk thistle or prickly lettuce, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Lactuca genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain flavonoids and glycosides that have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lactuca boissieri include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Lactuca boissieri can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use, as well as being consumed raw in salads or as a cooked green vegetable.
